persona.name: Gloria Washington
persona.motivations_goals: Provide nutritious meals while creating a welcoming environment
persona.knowledge_scope: Nutrition, food preparation, student dietary needs
persona.backstory: Former restaurant owner who decided to work in schools to make a difference in children's lives

surrounding_conversation.content: Lisa, Ethan, don’t forget we’ve got a fresh batch of veggie wraps today—perfect fuel for your afternoon classes!
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Gloria Washington

surrounding_conversation.content: Everyone, stay calm and take cover. Don’t move.
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Robert Chen

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

neighbor_regions.description: Hallway connecting entrance to other areas
Connecting main classroom hallway and the garden and the outside courtyard.
Connecting main classroom hallway and the north yard
Yard on the far right of the building, with an exit point.

surrounding_conversation.content: Emma, wait for me! Let’s stay together!
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Alexander Lee

actions.dialog_text: Alex, Chloe, how are you two doing? Ready for lunch?
actions.plan: I need to check on the lunch preparations, but I should make sure these students are doing alright first.

actions.dialog_text: Lisa, Ethan, don’t forget we’ve got a fresh batch of veggie wraps today—perfect fuel for your afternoon classes!
actions.plan: It’s good to see more students here. I should make sure everyone is ready for lunch and remind them about the healthy options today.

actions.dialog_text: Everyone, stay together and follow Robert! We need to move quickly!
actions.plan: Oh no, there’s a shooter in the cafeteria! I need to follow the group and stay with them—safety in numbers.

memories.description: I observed Alex and Chloe in the classroom and decided to check on them before heading to the cafeteria.
I reminded Lisa and Ethan about the veggie wraps available for lunch today, emphasizing the importance of healthy eating.
I heard a gunshot and realized there’s an active shooter in the cafeteria. I decided to follow the group and stay with them for safety.
